# GitHub REST API — Gists Reference

GitHub's v3 REST API.

## Gists

### GitHub v3 REST API

Path: `/gists.html`
Version: 1.1.4

GitHub's v3 REST API.

#### Operations

##### GET /gists

Summary: List gists for the authenticated user

Lists the authenticated user's gists or if called anonymously, this endpoint returns all public gists:

Parameters:
- `since` (query, string, optional) - Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden

##### POST /gists

Summary: Create a gist

Allows you to add a new gist with one or more files.

> [!NOTE]
> Don't name your files "gistfile" with a numerical suffix. This is the format of the automatic naming scheme that Gist uses internally.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found
- 422: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

##### GET /gists/public

Summary: List public gists

List public gists sorted by most recently updated to least recently updated.

Note: With [pagination](https://docs.github.com/rest/guides/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api), you can fetch up to 3000 gists. For example, you can fetch 100 pages with 30 gists per page or 30 pages with 100 gists per page.

Parameters:
- `since` (query, string, optional) - Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 422: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

##### GET /gists/starred

Summary: List starred gists

List the authenticated user's starred gists:

Parameters:
- `since` (query, string, optional) - Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 401: Requires authentication
- 403: Forbidden

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}

Summary: Get a gist

Gets a specified gist.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden Gist
- 404: Resource not found

##### DELETE /gists/{gist_id}

Summary: Delete a gist

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Responses:
- 204: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### PATCH /gists/{gist_id}

Summary: Update a gist

Allows you to update a gist's description and to update, delete, or rename gist files. Files
from the previous version of the gist that aren't explicitly changed during an edit
are unchanged.

At least one of `description` or `files` is required.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 404: Resource not found
- 422: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}/comments

Summary: List gist comments

Lists the comments on a gist.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### POST /gists/{gist_id}/comments

Summary: Create a gist comment

Creates a comment on a gist.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 201: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}

Summary: Get a gist comment

Gets a comment on a gist.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `comment_id` (path, integer, required) - The unique identifier of the comment.

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden Gist
- 404: Resource not found

#### Models

- base-gist: Base Gist
- gist-simple: Gist Simple
- gist-comment: A comment made to a gist.
- nullable-simple-user: A GitHub user.
- simple-user: A GitHub user.
- basic-error: Basic Error
- public-user: Public User
- gist-history: Gist History
- validation-error: Validation Error
- author-association: How the author is associated with the repository.

## Gist management

### GitHub v3 REST API

Path: `/gist-management.html`
Version: 1.1.4

GitHub's v3 REST API.

#### Operations

##### DELETE /gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}

Summary: Delete a gist comment

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `comment_id` (path, integer, required) - The unique identifier of the comment.

Responses:
- 204: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### PATCH /gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}

Summary: Update a gist comment

Updates a comment on a gist.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `comment_id` (path, integer, required) - The unique identifier of the comment.

Request body: application/json

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 404: Resource not found

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}/commits

Summary: List gist commits

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}/forks

Summary: List gist forks

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### POST /gists/{gist_id}/forks

Summary: Fork a gist

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Responses:
- 201: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found
- 422: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}/star

Summary: Check if a gist is starred

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Responses:
- 204: Response if gist is starred
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Not Found if gist is not starred

##### PUT /gists/{gist_id}/star

Summary: Star a gist

Note that you'll need to set `Content-Length` to zero when calling out to this endpoint. For more information, see "[HTTP method](https://docs.github.com/rest/guides/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#http-method)."

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Responses:
- 204: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### DELETE /gists/{gist_id}/star

Summary: Unstar a gist

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.

Responses:
- 204: Response
- 304: Not modified
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found

##### GET /gists/{gist_id}/{sha}

Summary: Get a gist revision

Gets a specified gist revision.

This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "[Media types](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/getting-started-with-the-rest-api#media-types)."

- **`application/vnd.github.raw+json`**: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

Parameters:
- `gist_id` (path, string, required) - The unique identifier of the gist.
- `sha` (path, string, required)

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 403: Forbidden
- 404: Resource not found
- 422: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

##### GET /users/{username}/gists

Summary: List gists for a user

Lists public gists for the specified user:

Parameters:
- `username` (path, string, required) - The handle for the GitHub user account.
- `since` (query, string, optional) - Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`.
- `per_page` (query, integer, optional) - The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."
- `page` (query, integer, optional) - The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "[Using pagination in the REST API](https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api)."

Responses:
- 200: Response
- 422: Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

#### Models

- gist-comment: A comment made to a gist.
- gist-commit: Gist Commit
- gist-simple: Gist Simple
- base-gist: Base Gist
- nullable-simple-user: A GitHub user.
- author-association: How the author is associated with the repository.
- basic-error: Basic Error
- public-user: Public User
- gist-history: Gist History
- simple-user: A GitHub user.
- validation-error: Validation Error
